release_notes:
🚀 V17.0 Major Updates:
• Massive Efficiency Boost: Database completely rebuilt to be 70% smaller and much faster.
• Live Updates: Added an automated background update checker.
• Main Screen Scroll: Added mouse-wheel scrolling to the image preview gallery.
• Low Consumption Refined: Verification module optimized for the new database engine.

🛠️ V17.1 Hotfix:
• General bug fixes and stability improvements for the network update checker.
